metadata.title: Advanced Tables
metadata.description: Improved table navigation, formatting, manipulation, and formulas

regex.source: Notice("Advanced Tables: Cursor must be in a table.")
regex.target: Notice("高级表格：光标必须位于表格中。")

regex.source: Notice("Advanced Tables: Next row also bound to enter. Possibly producing double actions. See Advanced Tables settings.")
regex.target: Notice("高级表格：下一行也绑定到回车键，可能会产生双重操作。请查看高级表格设置。")

regex.source: Notice("Advanced Tables: Next cell also bound to tab. Possibly producing double actions. See Advanced Tables settings.")
regex.target: Notice("高级表格：下一个单元格也绑定到 Tab 键，可能会产生双重操作。请查看高级表格设置。")

regex.source: Notice("Advanced Tables: Previous cell also bound to shift+tab. Possibly producing double actions. See Advanced Tables settings.")
regex.target: Notice("高级表格：上一个单元格也绑定到 Shift+Tab 键，可能会产生双重操作。请查看高级表格设置。")

regex.source: name:"Format all tables in this file"
regex.target: name:"格式化此文件中的所有表格"
.setName("将 Tab 键绑定到表格导航")

regex.source: .setDesc('Requires restart of Obsidian. If enabled, when the cursor is in a table, enter advances to the next row. Disabling this can help avoid conflicting with tag or CJK autocompletion. If disabling, bind "Go to ..." in the Obsidian Hotkeys settings.')
regex.target: .setDesc('需要重启 Obsidian。如果启用，当光标位于表格中时，回车键将跳转到下一行。禁用此功能可以帮助避免与标签或 CJK 自动补全冲突。如果禁用，请在 Obsidian 热键设置中绑定“转到...”功能。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Requires restart of Obsidian. If enabled, when the cursor is in a table, tab/shift+tab navigate between cells. Disabling this can help avoid conflicting with tag or CJK autocompletion. If disabling, bind "Go to ..." in the Obsidian Hotkeys settings.')
regex.target: .setDesc('需要重启 Obsidian。如果启用，当光标位于表格中时，Tab/Shift+Tab 将在单元格之间导航。禁用此功能可以帮助避免与标签或 CJK 自动补全冲突。如果禁用，请在 Obsidian 热键设置中绑定“转到...”功能。')

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, table cells will have spaces added to match the width of the longest cell in the column.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，表格单元格将添加空格以匹配该列中最长单元格的宽度。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, a button which opens the table controls toolbar will be added to the Obsidian sidebar. The toolbar can also be opened with a Hotkey. Changes only take effect on reload.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，将在 Obsidian 侧边栏添加一个按钮，以打开表格控制工具栏。该工具栏也可以通过热键打开。更改仅在重新加载后生效。")

regex.source: .appendText("If this plugin adds value for you and you would like to help support continued development, please use the buttons below:")
regex.target: .appendText("如果此插件对您有帮助，并且您希望支持其持续开发，请使用以下按钮：")
